claim_boundary: Open-only adaptive-multiseed independent 8X6B/9E6Y computational Docking geometry surrogate; not binding, affinity, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, or submission evidence.
required_validation: outer receipt schema/status/manifest/freeze/smoke/calibration/formal-artifact hashes and both claims plus revision
exactly 4 lanes x 5 folds and 20 RESULT.json/log hashes
training TSV and split artifact hashes plus exact whole-parent score partition
candidate, parent framework, teacher source, truth and M2 cross-lane closure
source hierarchy weights: 0.5 per source then equal parent then equal candidate
lane contact weights A=0/0, B=0/0, C=1.5/0, D=1.0/0.5
all result component and prediction artifact hashes
scope: Wait for the frozen V2.2.2 OUTER_DEVELOPMENT_RECEIPT, validate all 20 open-only base-lane results, aggregate descriptive A/B/C/D OOF metrics, then stop.
trainer_result_claim_boundary: Open-only computational surrogate of independent 8X6B/9E6Y Docking geometry; not binding probability, affinity, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, or submission evidence.
